overall.description: A smooth aerial drone shot moving along a sandy coastal beach in a game engine simulation. The camera travels from an open beach area toward and past a red wooden coastal building, with a distant town visible across the calm water under clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with coastal dunes

agents.ego_description: flying steadily forward along the beach at low altitude, maintaining parallel course to the shoreline

entered.detail: expansive golden sand beach stretching along the coastline
calm blue ocean water meeting the shore
rolling sand dunes with sparse vegetation
scattered evergreen trees atop the dunes
cluster of buildings visible across the water on the opposite shore
low hills and mountains forming the distant backdrop

segments.scene_description: The camera glides smoothly over an expansive sandy beach under clear blue skies. To the right, calm coastal waters stretch toward a distant town visible across the bay, while sand dunes with scattered pine trees line the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal dunes with wooden beach house

events.description: red wooden building comes into view on the left as terrain transitions from pure sand to grassy dunes

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the red coastal building, moving along the boundary between grassy dunes and sandy beach

entered.detail: traditional red wooden coastal house with white-framed windows and dark roof
sandy terrain covered with dry brown grass and wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a zone featuring a prominent red wooden building on the left, situated among dry grassy dunes. The sandy beach shifts to the right side of the frame as the camera continues its forward trajectory along the coast, with the distant town still visible across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide over a serene coastline that shifts from an open sandy expanse to a focused view of coastal architecture. It begins by sweeping across a wide beach under clear blue skies, with calm waters to the right stretching toward a distant town and pine-dotted dunes to the left. As the camera maintains its forward trajectory, the landscape transitions into a zone of dry grassy dunes. The scene then centers on a prominent red wooden building appearing on the left, while the sandy shoreline shifts toward the right side of the frame. The movement concludes as the camera passes the structure, keeping the far-off town visible across the bay.
